field.name: ma_kho
field.check: ma_kho not in (select ma_kho from dmkho)

processing.text: if @@admin = 0 and @type = '1' begin if @@sysDatabaseName.dbo.FastBusiness$System$GetAuthorize(@@admin, @@userID, 'SFCShop', 'Edit') = 0 select @type = '0' end declare @q nvarchar(4000), @duplicate nvarchar(4000), @irregular nvarchar(4000), @irregularChars varchar(128), @field varchar(32), @r int, @d datetime select @irregularChars = &IrregularValue;, @d = getDate() select @irregular = case @@language when 'v' then N'Giá trị tại ô %invalidCell có chứa các ký tự: ' + @irregularChars else 'The value of cell %invalidCell contains any of the following characters: ' + @irregularChars end select @duplicate = case @@language when 'v' then N'Giá trị tại ô %invalidCell đã có hoặc lồng nhau.' else 'The value of cell %invalidCell is invalid or already exists.' end create index i on @@table (ma_px) -- Delete if @type = '0' delete @@table from @@table a join sfdmxuong b on a.ma_px = b.ma_px -- Checking &Checking; select @field = 'ma_px', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_px like '%[' + @irregularChars + ']%'&Irregular; select @field = 'ma_kho' if @@admin <> 1 begin select @r = min(a.stt) from @@table a where not exists(select 1 from sfdmxuong b where a.ma_px = b.ma_px) and not exists(select 1 from dmkho c where a.ma_kho = c.ma_kho and c.ma_dvcs in (select distinct ma_dvcs from sysunitrights where user_id = @@userID and r_new = 1))&Error; if @type = '1' begin select @r = min(a.stt) from @@table a where exists(select 1 from sfdmxuong b where a.ma_px = b.ma_px) and not exists(select 1 from dmkho c where a.ma_kho = c.ma_kho and c.ma_dvcs in (select distinct ma_dvcs from sysunitrights where user_id = @@userID and r_edit= 1))&Error; end end -- Gather select a.* into #k from @@table a join sfdmxuong b on a.ma_px = b.ma_px delete @@table from @@table a join #k b on a.ma_px = b.ma_px -- Checking select @field = 'ma_px' select @q = 'select top 1 @r = a.stt from @@table a, @@table b with (index(i)) where a.ma_px <> b.ma_px and a.ma_px like rtrim(b.ma_px) + ''%''' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@r int output', @r = @r output&Duplicate; select top 1 @r = a.stt from @@table a, sfdmxuong b with (index(PK_sfdmxuong)) where a.ma_px like rtrim(b.ma_px) + '%'&Duplicate; select @q = 'select top 1 @r = b.stt from sfdmxuong a, @@table b with (index(i)) where a.ma_px like rtrim(b.ma_px) + ''%''' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@r int output', @r = @r output&Duplicate; -- Insert &Inserting; -- Update if @type = '1' begin &Updating; end
